title: Researcher plain-language glossary layer (>= 2 datasets)
context: Researchers and analysts struggle with confusing field names and terms. This adds a sourced plain-language glossary layer over >= 2 delivered dictionaries, framed for researchers/analysts and explicitly NOT patient advice. Every entry is sourced.
objective: Produce a sourced researcher-facing plain-language glossary for confusing fields/terms across at least two delivered dictionaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Plain-language entries for confusing fields/terms in >= 2 delivered dictionaries, each sourced (provenance), framed for researchers/analysts - not patient advice.
